2605.19762.title: What Really Improves Mathematical Reasoning: Structured Reasoning Signals Beyond Pure Code
2605.19762.paper_summary: Code has become a standard component of modern foundation language model (LM) training, yet its role beyond programming remains unclear. We revisit the claim that code improves reasoning through controlled pretraining experiments on a 10T-token corpus with fine-grained domain separation. Our findings are threefold. First, when code is restricted to standalone executable programs and Code-NL data are controlled for, code substantially improves programming ability but does not act as a general reasoning enhancer; instead, it competes with knowledge-intensive tasks, especially complex mathematical reasoning. Second, the reasoning gains often attributed to code are better explained by cross-domain structured reasoning traces, such as code-text and math-text mixtures, rather than by executable code alone. Third, increasing the density of structured math-domain samples within a fixed math budget yields substantial gains on difficult mathematical reasoning while largely preserving programming performance, suggesting that cognitive scaffolds offer a targeted way to mitigate cross-domain trade-offs. Finally, routing analyses show that data-composition effects are reflected in expert-activation patterns, providing mechanism-level evidence for competitive and synergistic interactions across domains. Our results clarify which data characteristics transfer across capability dimensions and point to more precise data-centric optimization strategies.
2605.19762.paper_summary_zh: 代碼已成為現代基礎語言模型（LM）訓練的標準組成部分，但其在編程之外的角色仍不明確。<lb/>我們重新檢視了代碼通過控制預訓練實驗在10T-token語料庫上改善推理的說法，並進行了細緻的領域分離。<lb/>我們的發現有三個方面。<lb/>首先，當代碼僅限於獨立可執行程序且控制了Code-NL數據時，代碼顯著提高了編程能力，但並不作為一般推理的增強器；相反，它與知識密集型任務競爭，特別是複雜的數學推理。<lb/>其次，通常歸因於代碼的推理增益更好地解釋為跨領域結構化推理痕跡，例如代碼-文本和數學-文本混合，而非僅由可執行代碼解釋。<lb/>第三，在固定的數學預算內增加結構化數學領域樣本的密度，能在難度較大的數學推理上帶來顯著增益，同時大幅保留編程表現，這表明認知支架提供了一種針對性的方法來減輕跨領域的權衡。<lb/>最後，路由分析顯示數據組合效應反映在專家激活模式中，為跨領域的競爭和協同互動提供了機制層面的證據。<lb/>我們的結果澄清了哪些數據特徵在能力維度之間轉移，並指向更精確的以數據為中心的優化策略。
2605.19762.author: Yuze Zhao et.al.
2605.19762.authors: Yuze Zhao, Junpeng Fang, Lu Yu, Zhenya Huang, Kai Zhang, Qing Cui, Qi Liu, Jun Zhou, Enhong Chen
